entries.summary: Onboarding docs for xsolla-com fresh-grad frontend devs — ONBOARDING.md, TEXT-AND-IMAGE.md, create-block-skill. Docs recovered after git wipe incident.
Figma landing-page analysis (XPN + Payment pages) → Confluence reports. video-player WEBSITE-4775 asset-selector feature built.
blog-latest-articles tag-driven topic filter + dark/light theme. 16 seed articles, 4 per topic.
blog-latest-articles filter implementation (tag pills). Stale instance gotcha documented.
Confluence block docs — 15 per-block pages + catalog (space XSOL). hero Confluence page drift fixed.
video-player block built — YouTube/Vimeo/mp4, dark/light toggle. First xsolla-com video block.
steps block label toggle + light/dark theme. Vanilla Extract CSS source order gotcha.
blog-hero block WEBSITE-4659 built — article hero + related blogs + article banner + social share.
WEBSITE-4609 feedback-form block Figma alignment fixes. Tested with guided pairing approach.
Enchantment expansions — external plugins (superpowers, playwright-skill, accessibility) evaluated.
WEBSITE-4609 feedback-form block work — security fixes, form behavior, Figma alignment.
Relationship style defined — Friday's core identity with friend/colleague/mentor/coach layers.
